channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 27th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chalcombe Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council left bag of cuttings etc, 27th April
item.description:
Large bag been left for weeks ! Please need this removed as it’s infested with rats !!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of waste left, 27th April
item.description:
Bags if waste dropped for about 3 days now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hatton Close, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to electric box, 27th April
item.description:
Outside the entrance to Willersley park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willersley Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 100 Arsenal road, 27th April
item.description:
Still large weeds and dumped sofa causing obstruction on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arsenal Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Mattress on Percy Road, 27th April
item.description:
This mattress has been here for a while now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Percy Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People with Rental Van did unload the whole van on bins, 27th April
item.description:
I wanted to send a pic because the foxes drag all the food waste all over the place from these bins.But when i passed by ,two man in a rented Enterprise Van Numberplate DL24VVY did unload the entire Van onto these bins including furniture.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Heath, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: EV restaurant advertising blocking footpath, 27th April
item.description:
A frame advertisement for EV restaurant blocking the entire public footpath. Reported multiple times with no response from the council. Unsafe and irresponsible - public access for disabled people is completely blocked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatfields, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very end of the road nearest the station lots of household rubbish and works rubbish, 27th April
item.description:
The very end of fendyke Road near the station the house on the corner has all his work waist and house hold waist just on the pavement my daughter fell over and cut her hand on rusted nail. When o knocked on the door the man was belligerent shouting and told me to mind my own business have been past many times and always rubbish on the floor he also said it stops cars parking. Very u safe stuff is there and flammable liquids. I spoke to a neighbour who had said they’ve tried many times to tell him and he doesn’t care
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress and rubbish bags, 27th April
item.description:
Mattress and rubbish bags flytipped under the railway arch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatfields, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on fence, 27th April
item.description:
Graffiti on fence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick wall collapsed, unstable, needs urgent attention, 27th April
item.description:
The brick wall to the close has been broken down, this has been reported and nothing has been done. The remainder of the wall is unstable, needs urgent attention. Debris and bricks left all on the ground.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Broom Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped recycling boxes, 27th April
item.description:
Recycling boxes filled with garden waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thornet Wood Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pallet left on pavement, 27th April
item.description:
There is a large pallet left out on pavement from no 2 . It is right near the lamp post and elderly people and mums with pram are having difficulty getting past. It Ben there for several weeks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charldane Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newly planted trees dying through lack of water., 27th April
item.description:
Trees newly planted eighteen months ago desperately need watering.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes dumped blocking the pavement between crossings, 27th April
item.description:
Please see photo for unacceptable bike parking from Forest. Completely blocking the pavement between crossings for all users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Matthias Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unemptied bins rubbish overflowing, 27th April
item.description:
Two bins near subway with Lennard Road/ near New Beckenham station. They have not been emptied for a long time and consequently rubbish spilling out across the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling throughout courtyard, 27th April
item.description:
Residents of Flat 9 have a uncontrollable large dog whom fouls throughout the shared courtyard and is never cleaned up by the owners. We have contacted our housing association contact Sophia ( sophia.opoku-addo@southwark.gov.uk) on several occasions but have not had a response. This should be escalated as it is a health hazard and the owners cannot control their dog in this public area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lomond Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad fixing job, 27th April
item.description:
There was some roadworks, probably some utility companies, and they didn't put back the bricks and just filled it in. That's poor job and that need to come back and fix it properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 305, Trinity Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 27th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
